title: Article 03: Free Will in Two Frames — Genesis to Quantum

equations.word_equation: the rate of change of coherence equals openness times grace times the remaining coherence gap minus entropy times current coherence
equations.spoken_explanation: Coherence grows when grace can couple into an open agent and shrinks when entropy keeps draining the current state.
equations.summary: Base coherence dynamics with openness gating grace.

equations.word_equation: steady-state coherence equals openness-grace coupling divided by openness-grace coupling plus entropy
equations.spoken_explanation: At equilibrium, coherence settles at the fraction of total system pressure contributed by grace coupling rather than entropy.
equations.summary: Equilibrium coherence for the base model.

equations.word_equation: the rate of change of coherence equals the surrender-scaled grace term times the remaining gap minus entropy times current coherence
equations.spoken_explanation: The surrender parameter changes how much grace actually couples into the agent before entropy is subtracted.
equations.summary: Surrender-parameter version of the coherence equation.

equations.word_equation: the rate of change of coherence equals openness times grace times the remaining coherence gap minus entropy times current coherence
equations.spoken_explanation: Coherence grows when grace can couple into an open agent and shrinks when entropy keeps draining the current state.
equations.summary: Base coherence dynamics with openness gating grace.

equations.word_equation: with zero coupling, coherence decays only by entropy
equations.spoken_explanation: When the agent is fully closed, grace contributes nothing to growth and entropy drives the whole trajectory downward.

equations.word_equation: with partial coupling, coherence grows at roughly half-strength grace input minus entropy
equations.spoken_explanation: Performance posture opens the channel only partway, so grace helps but does not fully dominate the entropy term.

equations.word_equation: performance equilibrium coherence equals half-strength grace divided by half-strength grace plus entropy, which simplifies to grace over grace plus twice entropy
equations.spoken_explanation: Under performance posture, entropy effectively counts twice as heavily against the reachable steady state.

equations.word_equation: the rate of change of coherence equals full grace input across the remaining gap minus entropy times current coherence
equations.spoken_explanation: In full surrender the grace term is no longer throttled, so the system receives maximum growth pressure against entropy.

equations.word_equation: steady-state coherence equals grace divided by grace plus entropy
equations.spoken_explanation: With full coupling, equilibrium depends only on the balance between grace input and entropy load.

notes: Math translation is provisional and revisitable for this workflow.
Existing preview artifacts are consumed when present, but stale support files are recorded as loopback rather than treated as blockers.
